data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_DadYoureHereWithY:
DAD: Hm?\pWell, if it isn't {PLAYER}!
So you're all finished moving in?\pI'm surprised that you managed to
get here by yourself.\pOh, I see.
You're with your POKéMON.\pHm... Then I guess you're going to
become a TRAINER like me, {PLAYER}.\pThat's great news!
I'll be looking forward to it!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_WallyIdLikeAPokem: Um... I... I'd like to get a\nPOKéMON, please...
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_DadOhYoureWallyRi: DAD: Hm? You're... Uh... Oh, right.\nYou're WALLY, right?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_WallyIveNeverCaug:
WALLY: I'm going to go stay with my
relatives in VERDANTURF TOWN.\pI thought I would be lonely by myself,
so I wanted to take a POKéMON along.\pBut I've never caught a POKéMON before.
I don't know how...
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_DadPlayerGoWithWa: DAD: {PLAYER}, you heard that,\nright?\pGo with WALLY and make sure that he\nsafely catches a POKéMON.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_IllLoanYouMyZigza: WALLY, here, I'll loan you my POKéMON.\pWALLY received a ZIGZAGOON!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_WallyThankYouAndD: WALLY: Oh, wow!\nA POKéMON!\pDAD: Hm. I'll give you a POKé BALL, too.\nGo for it!\pWALLY received a POKé BALL!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_DadSoDidItWorkOut: DAD: So, did it work out?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_WallyThankYouBye:
WALLY: Thank you, yes, it did.
Here's your POKéMON back.\p{PLAYER}, thank you for coming along
with me.\pYou two are why I was able to catch
my POKéMON.\pI promise I'll take really good
care of it.\pOh! My mom's waiting for me, so I
have to go!\pBye, {PLAYER}!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_DadGoCollectBadge:
DAD: Now...\p{PLAYER}, if you want to become a
strong TRAINER, here's my advice.\pHead for RUSTBORO CITY beyond this
town.\pThere, you should challenge the GYM
LEADER, ROXANNE.\pAfter her, go on to other POKéMON
GYMS and defeat their LEADERS.\pCollect BADGES from them,
understood?\pOf course, I'm a GYM LEADER, too.
We'll battle one day, {PLAYER}.\pBut that's only after you become
stronger, {PLAYER}.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_NormanGoToRustbor:
DAD: Hm? Aren't you going to the
POKéMON GYM in RUSTBORO CITY?\pThere's no challenge for me to
battle a greenhorn TRAINER.\p{PLAYER}, I want you to challenge me
when you become a lot stronger.\pI'll battle you, {PLAYER}, when you
can show me four GYM BADGES, okay?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_NormanGoToDewford:
DAD: I see... So, you've beaten the
GYM LEADER in RUSTBORO CITY.\pBut there are many more TRAINERS
who are stronger than you, {PLAYER}.\pAcross the sea in DEWFORD TOWN is a
GYM LEADER named BRAWLY.\pYou should go challenge him.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_YouHaveGottenStro: DAD: Hm... {PLAYER}, you have gotten\nstronger.\pI can tell by the number of BADGES\nthat you've earned.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_NormanIntro:
DAD: Hm...
So, you did get four GYM BADGES.\pFine, as I promised, we will have a
POKéMON battle.\p{PLAYER}...\pI'm so happy that I can have a 
real battle with my own child.\pBut, a battle is a battle!\pI will do everything in my power as
a GYM LEADER to win.\p{PLAYER}, you'd better give it your
best shot, too!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_NormanDefeat: ...\pI... I can't...\pI can't believe it. {PLAYER}...\pI lost to {PLAYER}?\pBut, rules are rules!\nHere, take this.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_ExplainBalanceBad:
DAD: With that BADGE, the DEFENSE
of all your POKéMON will increase.\pPOKéMON that know the HM move SURF
will be able to travel over water.\pThis is my gift to you. {PLAYER}, I'm
sure you can use it correctly.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_ExplainFacade: DAD: TM42 contains FACADE.\pIt doubles the power of moves if\nthe POKéMON is poisoned, paralyzed,\lor burned.\pIt might be able to turn a bad\nsituation into an advantage.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_DadHappyAndSad: DAD: As the GYM LEADER, I can't\nexpress how upset I am...\pBut as a father, it makes me both\nhappy and a little sad. It's odd...
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_WallysParentsHave: DAD: Oh, yes...\pWALLY's parents came calling\nearlier.\pThey said that they had something\nthey wanted to give you, {PLAYER}.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_DadGoingToKeepTra:
DAD: {PLAYER}, you should go visit
your mother every so often.\pI'm going to stay here and redouble
my training.\pIt would bother me as a TRAINER to
not avenge my loss to you, {PLAYER}!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_DadNoAmountOfTrai: DAD: {PLAYER}, how are things going?\pThe world of POKéMON is deep.\pI honestly think that no amount of\ntraining would ever be enough.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_GymGuideAdvice:
Hey, how's it going, CHAMPION-
bound {PLAYER}?\pThe doors in this GYM open when you
beat the awaiting TRAINERS.\pWhoops! The doors in this room are
already open, so don't attack me!\pThe TRAINERS of PETALBURG GYM use
all kinds of items.\pThe door at the left leads to the
SPEED ROOM.\pThe door at the right leads to the
ACCURACY ROOM.\pThe room's name will be on the
door, so choose carefully.\pOnce you've chosen the door...
Well, hey, go for it!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_GymGuidePostVicto: {PLAYER}! Whoa! You've overcome even\nyour own father!\pLike, whoa!\nWhat a stunning turn of events!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_RandallIntro: The ability to attack before the\nopponent...\pJust that alone puts me at a great\nadvantage, don't you agree?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_RandallPostBattle:
Go on to the next room where a new
challenge awaits you.\pAt the left is the ZERO REDUCTION
ROOM.\pThe right door leads to the DEFENSE
ROOM.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_RandallPostBadge: Whomever you beat, and whomever you\nmay lose to, you never shirk from\ltraining yourself and your POKéMON.\pThat's what I think being a\nGYM LEADER is all about.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_ParkerIntro: Don't waste your time trying to\nlower my POKéMON's abilities!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_ParkerDefeat: My POKéMON's abilities weren't\nharmed, but I still lost...
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_ParkerPostBattle: The next room is the STRENGTH ROOM.\nCan you withstand brute force?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_ParkerPostBadge: After you beat our LEADER, the\ntraining has become a lot tougher.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_GeorgeIntro:
Just when you think you're going to
win, your opponent restores HP...\pCan you just imagine how awful that
must feel?\pI'll show you exactly how awful it
feels!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_GeorgeDefeat: I couldn't restore HP enough...\nWhat ATTACK power...
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_GeorgePostBattle:
I should have expected no less from
our LEADER's kid.\pNo, wait! A TRAINER's abilities are
earned only through effort.\pI lost because my own efforts
weren't enough.\pGo on! The ONE-HIT KO ROOM is next.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_GeorgePostBadge: I'm going to keep training at GYMS.\nOne day, I'll become a LEADER.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_BerkeIntro: I'm not going to take it easy just\nbecause you're our LEADER's kid.\pI'll show you how horrid it is for\na POKéMON to take a critical hit!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_BerkePostBattle:
Your father really is strong. He's
a TRAINER worth my respect.\pAnd, I sense the same glow coming
from you as your father.\pI hope that you'll stage a terrific
battle with your father!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_BerkePostBadge: Since your dad became the LEADER,\nthe TRAINERS of PETALBURG CITY have\lbecome a lot tougher.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_MaryIntro: Giggle...\nThis is the ACCURACY ROOM.\pIt's pretty nasty when every attack\nlands without fail.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_MaryDefeat: You were a cut above me...
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_MaryPostBattle:
There are some even stronger
TRAINERS waiting for you.\pThe left is the DEFENSE ROOM, and
the right is the RECOVERY ROOM.\pYour POKéMON's ATTACK power will be
on trial either way.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_MaryPostBadge: Do you know what we're trying to\nachieve as TRAINERS?\pWe're striving to become soul mates\nwith our POKéMON.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_LoriIntro: The higher the DEFENSE, the more\nreckless I can be in attack.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_LoriPostBattle:
I think you've taught me a valuable
lesson here.\pNow, go on! The left door goes to
the STRENGTH ROOM.\pThe right door opens to the
ONE-HIT KO ROOM.\pBoth of them have TRAINERS who are
offensively skilled.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_LoriPostBadge: Hi! Have you tried using SURF?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_JodyIntro: Our GYM LEADER told us to go all out\nand beat you.\pEven if you happen to be the\nLEADER's kid!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_JodiPostBattle: The way you use your POKéMON...\nIt's like your father's style.\pGo on through! The GYM LEADER, your\nfather, is waiting!
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_JodiPostBadge: Sure, it's fine to make your POKéMON\nstronger.\pBut what decides the winner?\pWhy, it's the feelings TRAINERS have for\ntheir POKéMON.
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_DoorAppearsLocked: This door appears to be locked\nright now...
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_EnterSpeedRoom: “SPEED ROOM,” the sign says.\pDo you want to go through?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.UnknownString_817B8A8: This door appears to be locked\nright now...
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_EnterAccuracyRoom: “ACCURACY ROOM,” the sign says.\pDo you want to go through?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_EnterZeroReductio: “ZERO REDUCTION ROOM,” the sign\nsays.\pDo you want to go through?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_EnterDefenseRoom: “DEFENSE ROOM,” the sign says.\pDo you want to go through?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_EnterRecoveryRoom: “RECOVERY ROOM,” the sign says.\pDo you want to go through?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_EnterStrengthRoom: “STRENGTH ROOM,” the sign says.\pDo you want to go through?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_EnterOHKORoom: “ONE-HIT KO ROOM,” the sign says.\pDo you want to go through?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_EnterGymLeadersRo: “GYM LEADER'S ROOM\p“See for yourself what POKéMON await\nyou!” the sign says.\pDo you want to go through?
data/maps/PetalburgCity_Gym/text.inc.PetalburgCity_Gym_Text_GymStatueCertifie: PETALBURG CITY POKéMON GYM\pNORMAN'S CERTIFIED TRAINERS:\n{PLAYER}
